ground_truth.title: Online Courses & Tutorials
ground_truth.main_content:
Online Courses & Tutorials

Online handsewn shoemaking videos and tutorials.
Study, practice & build a strong foundation in handsewn shoe making

“This is so exciting!!! I’m enjoying your shoe making videos! Progress is being made!!! It’s working! This is truly a game changer, learning these techniques for construction…this is a far superior system. Even though it takes longer. Totally worth the effort.” Gitty Duncan
